reason: The statement does not apply to the text fragment provided. The text focuses on the narrative of the Exodus, the parting of the Red Sea, and the salvation of the Israelites with the help of the LORD. While there is mention of darkness and light in the context of the pillar of cloud providing darkness to the Egyptians and light to the Israelites, there is no explicit emphasis on Yahweh being both the God of light and darkness in this passage.
